roles.organization: Members of Commissions for State Final Examinations at FIT
Supervisors in Doctoral Study Programme at FIT

education_and_academic_qualification: 1992-1996: Secondary school of electrical engineering, Karla IV. 13, Pardubice; specialization in computer engineering;
1996-2002: Ms.C. studies (Ing.) at the Department of Computer Science and Engineering,Faculty of Electrical Engineering, Czech Technical University in Prague;
2002-2008: Ph.D. studies at the Department of Computer Science and Engineering, Faculty of Electrical Engineering, Czech Technical University in Prague
2009-2013: Max-Planck-Institut fur Informatik, Saarbrucken, Germany; position: post-doc researcher
2015: Associate Professor at FIT BUT, Head ofCPhoto@FITresearch group
2025: Professor at FIT BUT, Head ofCPhoto@FITresearch group
scientific_activities: Computer Graphics, High Dynamic Range Imaging, Image Processing and Computer Vision, Image and Video Quality Assessment, Human Visual Perception, Computational Photography and AestheticsComputational Photography Group - CPhoto@FIT
My personal webpagesGoogle Scholar citationsLinkedIn profileTwitter profile
awards: Outstanding master thesis award, Dean of FEL, CTU in Prague 2002
Trans it! - the best applicable inventions at CTU award 2008
Outstanding dissertaion award, Rector of CTU in Prague 2009
The Commemorative Medal of FIT BUT (The Bronze Medal) 2019
BUT Rector's award for extraordinary scientific achievements 2024
The Commemorative Medal of FIT BUT (The Silver Medal) 2025

teaching.consulting_hours: Please reserve your slot in wiki , or send me an email.
